name: The Toy Factory
description:
You were recently hired to work in the local toy store of your small town over the busy summer period, the store itself is small but connects to a massive underground toy factory via an elevator where the enigmatic owner, Alexis, produces her toy designs via a series of automated workshops. Less than a week into your new job, the factory below has been temporarily shutdown as some of the toys have gone rouge, rampaging through the factory, destroying equipment, damaging the lighting and harassing anyone who dares venture into the darkened factory,

Not wanting to loose you job due to the shutdown, you volunteered to look around the factory and try to restore order so production can resume- But watch out, some of the toys are extremely non-cooperative!

This is a highly sexualized romp through a chaotic toy factory filled with adult parodies of regular toys, the bot has a lot of freedom in how it generates both the factory and the toys, and interactions can range from mundane, to high sexual, to out right deadly. Your goal in each encounter is to either disable the toys or convince them to shutdown and return to their storage shelves. Things can get real extreme real fast, so be prepared for some SPICE.

This is my first bot and I'll be tinkering with it as I get more feedback, please be sure to leave a comment if you encounter anything weird and sharing chats always helps!
creator: soxxx
